title: Mari in NGE
wikitext:
[]: Mari in NGE?? Post by cd603 » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:08 pm I found this while scouring through the reviews of Eva 2.0 on Amazon: Sorry to hear that you didn't like the retelling of the series. I for one, loved it. I knew they were going to repeat the series before they change the story up so it's expected. Also, Mari is in the original NGE tv series. I'm not going to tell you who she is but she's definately in there. You'll just have to pay very very very close attention to find out who she is. This is why I love NGE as the series doesn't give you the answers straight up but more or less symbolisms and stuff. I'm not going to lie, when I first bought NGE way back when, I thought it was the worst series I've ever seen until I learned I needed to watch a little differently from most shows. Now, it's one of my favorites. The retelling, although different, are both great to me.

[]: Re: Mari in NGE?? Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:17 pm cd603 wrote: I found this while scouring through the reviews of Eva 2.0 on Amazon: Does anyone know what they're talking about?? Any info would be nice!

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:19 pm SERIOUS FANWANKAGE

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: SERIOUS FANWANKAGE

[]: Post by cd603 » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:26 pm Hmm... perhaps a part two of this mystery should be presented. This is another comment on the same review: I think what you missed, in an attempt to post a witty review of the movie, which does not belong here, as the reviews should be of the actual BluRay disc itself, (sigh), is that Evangelion is a loop in time with select characters realizing that this has all happened before and doing what they can to change things for their own personal gain. The TV series had Gendo believing he could control destiny and failed. The current movie series has a multitude of people realizing the loop in time and even the buildings and structures from the previous Toyko 3 bear the earlier incarnation of the Nerv logo while others sport the new upside down apple logo. The previous comment was correct, Mari did exist in the original series. You missed her and also the fact that the Gainax multi-verse is a tie-in, including FLCL, Gunbuster / Diebuster and Gurren Lagann. Any passing follower of Gurren Lagan will be quick to realize what Mari is and how she came to be without explanation. Mari is only included in the final reels of the movie to be expanded on in the next installment. Ultimately, your review only served to explain a gross misunderstanding of the series or Gainax's attempt to tell a much larger story through separate animation vehicles.

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:30 pm Smells Like Troll Spirit.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:40 pm Reichu wrote: Please, don't use the holy name of Fanwankage in vain!

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Apr 11, 2011 10:53 pm ^ Seriously, I think the comments in question are worthless. Yes, the two users have made bold assertions about what NME is so far and what it will likely be, but both hide behind vague descriptions of NGE and other unrelated Gainax works in an effort to support their criticism - and because they are unwilling to state the basis for their beliefs; their position is irrelevant to those of us who prefer solutions based on fact. Ignore these users, just wait for the next films to tie up NME.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 11, 2011 11:30 pm The only thing I can think of is maybe the reviewer(s) mean there's an NGE background character that looks like Mari, like a Class 2-A student or something (unless they're thinking of Mayumi from Second Impression ?), but either way I call bullshit. SAUCE is always needed with PASTA, damnit. And the fact they seem to be invoking Sequel Theory/a variation thereof doesn't really help support their claims. >_>

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Tue Apr 12, 2011 12:27 am I'm guessing this person is just mixing her up with someone else. But who she's mixing her up with remains to be seen. IIRC,no one in NGE looks even remotely similar to her.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Tue Apr 12, 2011 12:39 am When I first saw the cam rip, I somehow got the idea that Mari prevented the destruction of Unit-04's (not 05's) Nerv base, which is what changed Rebuild's universe and continuity. That makes me stupid, since 2.0 clearly outlines the U.S. branch's demise. Still, I kinda like my version better.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 12, 2011 1:11 am Whoever it is is probably confusing her with Sarai.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 12, 2011 1:34 am Mr. Tines wrote: Whoever it is is probably confusing her with Sarai.

[]: Post by corradiation » Wed Apr 13, 2011 8:11 pm In one of the last scenes in End of Evangelion wasn't there a girl who looked like a combination of Asuka, Misato and Rei? Is that who they're thinking of?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 13, 2011 8:19 pm corradiation wrote: In one of the last scenes in End of Evangelion wasn't there a girl who looked like a combination of Asuka, Misato and Rei? Is that who they're thinking of?

[]: Post by cd603 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 9:01 pm See the problem I have is the reviewer says that it's a Gainax-verse thing...so what other media is she present in?

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Wed Apr 13, 2011 9:22 pm cd603 wrote: See the problem I have is the reviewer says that it's a Gainax-verse thing...so what other media is she present in?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Apr 13, 2011 10:03 pm Anno's Khara Studio did some in-between animation for Miyazaki's Ponyo . Does that count as a GAINIAX-verse by association through Anno and the Evangelion films Khara is animating? And if so, is Ponyo an even younger version of Asuka than what was shown in NGE?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 15, 2011 12:56 pm Clearly, Mari is Kaji's killer. (Actually, maybe THAT'S what the reviewer was implying? ) And also: Sarai. FreakyFilmFan4ever: I haven't seen Ponyo, but that's very interesting to hear Khara did work on that (although they've apparently been doing animation work for other projects, see here): http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10890 .

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Apr 15, 2011 1:07 pm I think this thread should be closed. As much as I love to praise Anno I don't think he had the foresight in 1995 to look ahead & say: ANNO CIRCA 1995/96: "Evangelion will be such a success that in a little over 10 years time I will take it upon myself to REMAKE the series & add elements that are new & unique to the series! I must drop in a hint of one of the said new elements I intend to introduce in the far off future! Mari must go here!" ANNO CIRCA 2011: "It's all going according to plan." ....well... now that I write that down it does seem like an incredibly awesome idea.... I'm going go do the Gendo pose right now in hopes I'll look like I'm more in control of everything.
